title: Jagrav Optmized [NeoForge]
description: A fork of Jagrav Optimized for NeoForge, This is a lightweight optimization modpack with crazy optimization and fun gameplay
body:
![A Banner :)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58d5986789d2c9c6b09829786857565c266e3256_0.webp)
### About This Modpack📚

Jagrav Optimized is designed to deliver the best performance and a smooth gameplay experience in Minecraft.  
It combines high-quality optimization mods, shaders, and resource packs to enhance visuals while keeping frame rates high.  

**Optifine Parity ⚖️**
This is modpack doesn't have optifine but a great alternative of optifine which is Sodium which provides huge performance upgrades compared to optifine but sodium does not have features like optifine, to counter that other great quality-of-life mods has been added like zoomify, lambdynamic, iris shaders. These mods provide the same features that optifine haves.

**Feels just like vanilla 🍦**
Jagrav Optimized feels just like vanilla minecraft but with great performance upgrades and great quality-of-life upgrades like shaders, camera features, connected textures and other great quality-of-life upgrades.

### Key Features🔑
- Performance focused mods for smoother gameplay  
- Quality-of-life additions to improve your Minecraft experience  
- Shader and resource pack support for visual upgrades  
- Custom configurations for maximum efficiency  

### FAQs
1. - **Question-** How can I report bugs or get other information regarding the modpack?
   - **Answer-** Join our Discord.
2. - **Question-** Is the modpack updated reqularly?
   - **Answer-** Yes, this modpack is updated pretty often. Usually after 2-3 days of release of a new version of minecraft. But might now get updated in rare case scenarios.
### How to Install❓
1. Firstly download the version of this modpack you want, for example 1.21.8.
2. After downloading go to this website https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/
3. Scroll all the way down and you will see a box like this [Click on This!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7325e9c84dbe03ba234b26abb9e3642a1904ea9e.png)
4. Click on that and select the ".mrpack" of the downloaded modpack and upload that there.
5. Wait a bit and when it is done, simply download it.
6. After downloading open file explorer and go to downloads section.
7. Right click on the ".zip" file and click extratct here.
8. Roughly three folders will appear "mods, resourcepacks & shaderpacks".
9. Locate your ".minecraft" folder and open mods folder there and put all of the mods which you extracted from the modpack do the same for resourcepacks and shaderpacks, if there is config and option.txt too then it is completely your own wish if you want to use them, to use them drag both of them into ".minecraft" folder and click Replace the files in Destination.
10. Hope you understand all the steps. Have Fun!
> **Contact:** jagrav.modrinth@gmail.com
